{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032122293461E3C6BBBD885CCE6727"}"},"total":53},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7613534057708569369","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者的文笔真的太绝了！人物刻画细腻又鲜活，每一个细节都拿捏得恰到好处，情节推进自然流畅，没有丝毫刻意生硬之感，满满的赛博朋克氛围感直接拉满，沉浸感十足。感情线也写得细腻动人，真挚又戳心，情感铺垫层层递进，格外动人。期待后续更多精彩内容！","text_exts":[{"e":62,"s":58,"text":"赛博朋克","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741033745CCE6727%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227613534057708569369%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227590368808666156057%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772670303,"group_id":"7590368808666156057","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NztvrCGen4FnfBISevdq2lU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c1859cf9787243ce91afe4cc9b3e60dc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617730&x-signature=qcQS7LWXSKIZWvfTJzpyTZ62dA8%3D","user_id":"160978712669934","user_name":"潦草猫007"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"160978712669934","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7590368808666156057","book_info":{"abstract":"“名字？”
